personal.preferred_title: Data Analyst / Data Engineer | SQL, Snowflake, Power BI

summary: Data Analyst/Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience translating complex data into actionable reporting and scalable data solutions. Strong expertise in SQL, dimensional modeling, ETL pipelines, and stakeholder-facing analytics delivery, with hands-on experience in cloud data ecosystems and operational reporting. Proven ability to work cross-functionally in fast-paced environments and deliver high-quality insights with clear business impact.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Developed and optimized complex SQL workflows and Python/Pandas data pipelines for 6,000+ telemetry endpoints.
Built reporting-ready data structures and metrics supporting operational analytics and executive decision-making.
Implemented data quality validation, monitoring, and process-improvement workflows to increase trust in reporting outputs.
Partnered directly with stakeholders to gather requirements, prioritize reporting needs, and deliver scalable analytics solutions.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Produced analytics and dashboard insights from observability datasets to guide product and operations improvements.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to improve data clarity and reliability for business-facing reporting.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (APM SME)
bullets: Created reporting modules and extracted metrics for large enterprise teams in support of analysis and decision workflows.
Documented data/reporting patterns and enabled teams through practical training and support.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led data migration and modeling efforts with emphasis on performance, reliability, and analytical usability.
Built validation frameworks that improved data consistency and downstream confidence.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed large datasets and performance indicators to identify risks and recommend actionable improvements.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Enterprise Reporting Data Model Program
projects.description: Designed reporting-ready data structures and metrics pipelines to support cross-functional analytics and executive dashboards.

projects.name: Data Quality and Analytics Pipeline Optimization
projects.description: Improved data validation, query efficiency, and analytics reliability across large operational datasets.
